analysis.consistency: High. The data structure is complete and adheres to standard spell descriptions.
analysis.quality: High. The description is clear, mechanically sound according to common 5e conventions, and all necessary fields are present.

mechanics.effect: Inflicts high necrotic damage (7d8 + 30) on a failed Constitution save, half on success. Special effect: If a humanoid is killed by this spell, it rises as a permanent, commanded zombie on the caster's next turn.

analysis.notes: The damage scaling (7d8 + 30) is notably high for a 7th-level spell, leaning into the instant-kill potential via the zombie creation feature, which balances the raw damage output.
